title: A Portrayal of al-Wathiq, His Years, and the Extent of His Caliphate
description: of His Caliphate Someone who knew him personally reported that al-Wathiq was fair, tending to a ruddy complexion, and was handsome, of medium height and well-built. His left eye was paralyzed and had a white fleck.195 He died, as some claim, at the age of thirty-six; according to others, he succumbed at the age of thirty-two. Those who claim that he was thirty-six say that he was born in 196 192. Text: a'md 'alayhi. Addenda, DCCLXXV and Cairo edition (Mss. A and D(: ghumiya 'alayhi. 193.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
